title: ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. kochii
intro: Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. kochii, commonly known as the Natal star-grass or Kokerboom, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum orthophyllum subsp. kochii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even exhibit antiviral activity. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its bulbs, roots, or flowers, which can be used to create teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
